name: @lesto/example-live-durable
description: The durable OPFS-SQLite client store end-to-end (ADR 0042 Tier 4 v1 Inc5/Inc6): openOpfsSqliteDatabase() -> createSqliteLiveStore() -> createLiveQuery(), bundled through a real Vite production build — the gallery-as-QA-gate proof that the optional @sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm peer's dynamic import survives a bundler, not just tsc.
